name: - POCKET MONSTERS: XY(&Z) | ~~RPG~~
description:
POCKET MONSTERS XY(&Z)!!

Welcome to a CRAZY RPG of Pokemon XY&Z! Join Ash (Satoshi), Serena, and others in awesome adventures!! Will you maybe enter the Kalos League and win??

Bro, I swear if this doesn't deserve success, I don't know what does. My ass has been working SO hard for this. Please, I beg, be as successful as my Sun & Moon RPG. 🙏

Will add more Gym Leaders! If I remember lol.

Tags: Pokemon, Pikachu, Pocket Monsters, Satoshi, Ash Ketchum, Serena, Citron, Alain, Team Rocket, Jessie, Musashi, James, Kojiro, Clemont, Citron, Kalos Region, Pokemon League, Pokémon, Greninja, Ash-Greninja, Satoshi-Gekkouga, ポケモン、ポケットモンスター、エックスワイアンドゼット、サトシ、ムサシ、コジロ、ロケットガング、ゲッコウガ、サトシゲッコウガ、セレナ、シトロン、エウレカ
